IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (11584809.pdf)
SUMMARY: Versatile Building Automation System engineer and IT professional with vast knowledge of Enterprise Project Lifecycle methodology and experience to deliver insightful network infrastructure and building automation solutions.
SKILLS: System administration, Windows Server 2003, Windows Server 2008, VMware, Active Directory, Microsoft Exchange 2013, Large computer networks, Linux, Mac OS, Microsoft Dynamics, Access Control Security, Project Management Professional (PMP), Certified Information Security Manager, Certified Network Associate (CCNA), Certified Network Professional (CCNP), Certified Security Professional (CCSP)
